about.title: About — Bishvileinu · Memory Builds Life
about.meta_description: The Bishvileinu initiative — who we are, the story, the dual meaning in our name, the vision, and the three sides that make up the path.
about.twitter_description: The Bishvileinu initiative — who we are, the story, the dual meaning in our name, the vision, and the three sides that make up the path.
about.hero_lead: An initiative born of pain and of choice — to bridge remembrance in Israel with Jewish communities around the world.
about.background_title: The heroism of the fallen united the nation
about.solidarity_text: The nation came out in throngs to accompany the fallen on their final journey — a moment of deep national kinship. Their words of life became stickers and the voices of an entire generation.
about.diaspora_text: On the one hand, a dramatic rise in antisemitism that struck at the resilience of communities. On the other — mutual responsibility on a historic scale: open support for Israel through unprecedented donations and aid.
about.alt_memory_wall: A wall of photographs and stickers of fallen soldiers
about.meaning_body1: The journey along the path of their lives, the search for their values, and active work in an initiative that honors them — is a journey along a new, shared path of Diaspora communities and Israel. A meaningful path that will strengthen partnership and resilience in an Israel growing out of the rupture, and amid the challenges of the Jewish world in the Diaspora.
about.meaning_body2: For our sake they fought and paid with their lives. For our sake new initiatives were created in their memory, to make Israel a better place.
about.meaning_close: Let us reach out, join in, and widen the circle of action — for them and for us.
about.purpose_lead1: "Bishvileinu" widens the circle of memory and growth into the Jewish communities of the world. Communities are introduced to these exemplary figures, adopt an initiative of living memory, and become active partners in the building of Israel.
about.purpose_lead2: It is a gateway to meaningful involvement in building and strengthening Israeli society — an entry point to initiatives of resilience, community, culture, welfare, and educational work.
about.alt_hills: A landscape of hills at sunset — vision and hope
about.alt_builders: Illustration: people building a house with an Israeli flag — your children and your builders
about.side1_text: They open their memorial initiatives to communities, allowing individuals and groups to build — and to be built — by expanding them.
about.side2_text: They make the match, accompany the journey, tailor the right initiative to each community, and subsidize the encounter.
about.side3_text: They open a door, learn, adopt — and partner educationally, financially, and entrepreneurially in growing the project.
about.vision_l1: The journey does not end at the encounter —
about.vision_l3: and from there the sky is the limit.
about.vision_sub: For memory is the bridge between ruin and redemption.
about.prayer_quote: "Read not 'your children' but 'your builders.' May there be peace within your walls, and tranquility within your palaces."
about.closing_phrase: In their memory. For our sake.
